## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Operational impact

<!-- Config, metrics, logs, deployment, rollback, or compatibility impact. -->

## Verification

<!-- Include exact commands and results. -->

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make coverage`
- [ ] `make deploy-check`
- [ ] `make acceptance`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Docs were updated or the change is internal-only.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior was reviewed.
- [ ] Rollback or compatibility impact is documented.
- [ ] No generated build output, coverage files, or secrets are committed.
